name: MUHYOUGETEN (MIRAGE OF A FROZEN MOON IN THE HEAVENS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 6

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: C, H *

You can use this technique without hand seals if you wield a melee weapon. If you do, the technique can only affect an area adjacent to you, performing the technique does not provoke attacks of opportunity, and the Perform Requirements are increased by 6. Creatures within the area are trapped in prisons of ice (as with Hyourou no Jutsu, p166) and suffer 5d8 cold damage. A Strength check (DC 40) can be made to break a single square of ice, breaking free any creature trapped inside of it.

As an instant action at any time, you can shatter one or more squares of the prison, freeing creatures held within those squares and dealing 6d8 cold damage to them (no save). The same thing happens when the technique ends. The ice prisons are immune to physical damage dealt by characters that don't have an active Strength Rank of 4 or higher, and have 200 HP each.
